examples: Copies of the completed document transmittal will be retained by the originator.
As a minimum, submission of documents will be under cover of the BPS external transmittal.
An external transmittal is used to issue BPS controlled documents to external organizations.
The new LCD technology also improves the light transmittal of pixels, rendering brightness with an added benefit of lower battery drain.
In addition, this transmittal contains FY 2014 amendments for the Legislative Branch.
